## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Preflight checks pass (`scripts/verify/preflight.sh`)
- [ ] Docs updated if contracts/schemas/flows changed (README, docs/*, fixtures)
- [ ] Tests added/updated when harness exists (integration, message-contracts, snapshots, security)
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive references added to AO state or manifests
